2.solution: Let A units=5k, B units=8k per half. No gain/loss H1: 5kĂ—0.2a=8kĂ—0.25b â†’ a=2b. H2 profit: 5kĂ—0.2a+8kĂ—0.25b=kÂ·a+2kÂ·b=2kb+2kb=4kb=16 â†’ kb=4. Total CP_A=2Ă—5kĂ—a=20kb=80. Total CP_B=2Ă—8kĂ—b=16kb=64. Sum=144 lakhs.

3.solution: Let initial against=A, for=F=1600âˆ’A. New against=3.5A, for=Fâˆ’2.5A. Rejection margin=7Aâˆ’1600. Passing margin=Fâˆ’A=1600âˆ’2A. 7Aâˆ’1600=1.5(1600âˆ’2A) â†’ 10A=4000 â†’ A=400. Answer: B.

5.solution: Per 100 oranges at CP=100: sell 30 at 0.7CP=21; 35 rotten; sell 35 at 2.5CP=87.5. Total revenue=108.5. Profit%=8.5%. Answer: B.

9.solution: SP_shirt=3200Ă—0.875=2800; SP_pants=6000(1âˆ’x/100). Extra 1/7 discount: (2800+SP_pants)Ă—6/7=6000 â†’ 2800+SP_pants=7000 â†’ SP_pants=4200 â†’ x=30%. Effective pants price=4200Ă—6/7=3600. Net discount on pants=6000âˆ’3600=2400. Answer: A.

10.solution: 3/4Ă—(1250+CP_shirt)=750+CP_shirt â†’ 3750+3CP=3000+4CP â†’ CP=750. Discount=1/6: CP=MPĂ—5/6 â†’ MP=750Ă—6/5=900. Answer: C.
